channel.title: DSA and CP on Utsab's Digital Garden
channel.description: Recent content in DSA and CP on Utsab's Digital Garden

item.title: Linked List
item.description: 1. What is a Linked List? A linked list is a data structure made up of a chain of nodes, where each node holds: Some data A pointer to the next node Unlike arrays, linked list elements are not stored in contiguous memory. Each node can be anywhere in memory — they’re connected only through pointers. [data | next] --> [data | next] --> [data | next] --> NULL Node 1 Node 2 Node 3 2.
